name: Lawnmower Game: 2024
short_description: Lawnmower game saga is back. Drive now original lawnmower vehicle, cut grass, hang around and collect items in this story which is based now to futuristic food place
detailed_description:
Story:

Lawnmower game series is back with this new version. Player drive original lawnmower vehicle at this strange food place which is full of different food objects like donuts, marsmallow, hotdog, ribs, chocolate etc. Player mission is just hang and cut grass in this small open driving simulation game. There is fuel consumption and player need also collect fuel cans to get more fuel. If fuel goes to 0, game is over. Game contains also weather system.

So can you cut all grass again and be the best lawnmower guy in world in this new version for original lawnmower game

Features:

  • drive enough to get steam achievements

  • collect items to get steam achievements

  • fuel consumption

  • weather day system

  • Collectable fuel cans

  • Grass to cut
